data.name: severity.info
data.comment: Severity label for informational messages — the lowest severity tier. Surfaced as a status badge on notifications, log entries, and audit views. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: Severity label for warnings — actionable but non-blocking. Surfaced as a status badge on notifications, log entries, and audit views. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: Severity label for errors — blocking failures the user must address. Surfaced as a status badge on notifications, log entries, and audit views. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: Severity label for critical incidents — system-impacting failures (data loss risk, security). Surfaced as a status badge; pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: Common action verb on submit/commit buttons. Imperative; sentence case. Used across forms, dialogs, and inline editors at every layer of the architecture.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: Common action verb on dismiss/abort buttons. Imperative; sentence case. Pairs with Save in dialogs; standalone on multi-step flows.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: Common action verb on retry buttons after a failure. Imperative; sentence case. Often appears next to error severity badges or empty-state placeholders.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: Default empty-state placeholder shown while data is being fetched. Includes a trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026, single character) — translators should preserve the ellipsis convention even if their language uses a different terminal punctuation.
